name: viewset-with-nested-serializers
description: Validate that the skill produces a correct DRF ViewSet with nested serializers, eager loading, and proper router registration.
prompt: Create a Django REST Framework API for a BlogPost model that belongs to an Author and has many Comments. Each Comment belongs to a User. Use nested serializers to return the author name, post content, and comments with commenter username and text. Include the ViewSet, serializers, router registration, and queryset optimization.

assertions.description: Must use ModelSerializer for automatic field generation and validation.
Must use select_related for ForeignKey relationships to prevent N+1 queries.
Must use prefetch_related for reverse/many relationships to prevent N+1 queries.
Must use ModelViewSet or appropriate ViewSet mixin for CRUD operations.
Must register the ViewSet with a DefaultRouter for consistent URL generation.

name: custom-permission-class
description: Validate that the skill produces a custom DRF permission class with object-level checks, proper integration in a ViewSet, and test coverage.
prompt: Create a custom DRF permission class called IsOwnerOrReadOnly that allows read access to any authenticated user but restricts write operations to the object owner. Integrate it into a ProjectViewSet where get_queryset scopes by the authenticated user's organization. Include an APITestCase that verifies both allowed and denied access.

assertions.description: Must extend BasePermission for custom permission class definition.
Must implement has_object_permission for object-level authorization checks.
Must override get_queryset to scope data by authenticated user or tenant.
Must include APITestCase for integration testing of permissions.
Must assign permission_classes on the ViewSet to wire in the custom permission.
